title: API Connection Timeout
description: The checkout service is failing to connect to the payment gateway intermittently.

title: Update Footer Copyright
description: Update the year in the footer from 2025 to 2026 across all landing pages.

title: Mobile App Crash on Login
description: Android users reporting crashes when using the 'Remember Me' feature.

title: New Feature: Dark Mode
description: Request for a system-wide dark mode toggle in user settings.

title: Invoice Discrepancy
description: Customer claims they were billed twice for the February subscription.

title: Broken Image Links
description: Hero images on the documentation page are returning 404 errors.

title: Slow Dashboard Load
description: Main analytics dashboard takes over 10 seconds to render for large accounts.

title: CSV Export Error
description: Exporting user lists results in a 'Server Error 500' for lists over 1k rows.

title: Typo in Terms of Service
description: Section 4.2 has a spelling error: 'Lialibity' instead of 'Liability'.

title: SSO Integration Request
description: Inquiry regarding Okta integration for enterprise-level security.

title: Database Optimization
description: Run indexing on the transaction table to improve query performance.

title: Password Reset Email Delay
description: Users report waiting up to 20 minutes for the reset link to arrive.
